site.name: GP. KOUGKOUDIS
site.description: Curated 9, 14 and 18 karat gold jewelry collections with precious and semi-precious stones, in Petroupoli, Athens.

common.thankYou: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.
common.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us.

home.heroSubtitle: Curated collections of 9, 14 and 18 karat gold jewelry with precious and semi-precious stones — for every meaningful moment.
home.featuredCollectionsSubtitle: A selection of our most beloved designs.
home.servicesSubtitle: Bespoke design, repairs, appraisals and gold buying — with the expertise of three generations.
home.storyTitle: A family devoted to fine jewelry
home.storySubtitle: The Kougkoudis Brothers continue the family tradition in the heart of Petroupoli, with the same love for the craft.
home.visitTitle: We look forward to welcoming you in Petroupoli
home.visitDescription: Come to the store to see our collection in person. We welcome you with a smile and no obligation.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: From timeless classics to modern designs.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: With passion for jewelry and dedication to our clients.

customDesign.title: Custom design
customDesign.tagline: The jewel of your dreams, made just for you.
customDesign.description: We design and craft unique jewelry from your ideas, sketches or reference photos.

repairs.title: Repairs & Restoration
repairs.tagline: We bring your beloved pieces back to life.
repairs.description: From soldering and resizing to full restoration of heirloom pieces.

engraving.title: Engraving
engraving.tagline: Make every piece even more personal.
engraving.description: Machine and hand engraving of names, dates and symbols.

appraisals.title: Appraisals
appraisals.tagline: Official appraisals for insurance and inheritance.
appraisals.description: We provide professional appraisals from experienced goldsmiths with an official certificate.

buyGold.title: Buy Gold
buyGold.description: We buy gold jewelry and coins with modern weighing equipment and full transparency.

wedding.title: Wedding & Engagement
wedding.heroSubtitle: Choose or design with us the wedding bands and engagement ring that will last a lifetime.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Three generations of goldsmiths in Petroupoli.
about.missionText: To offer you jewelry of timeless beauty, with the same attention to detail and respect for every client that has defined us for decades.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We're here for any question. Reach out the way that suits you best.
